name: Crabmeat Stuffed Jalapenos (Texas Popcorn)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut peppers in half lengthwise and discard the pulp and seeds.
2. Rinse the peppers carefully.
3. In a large mixing bowl, combine all ingredients except the breading mixture, except cracker meal.
4. Stuff pepper halves with crab mixture and press stuffing around the pepper.
5. Set peppers aside.
6. To prepare breading mixture: Place 2 cups cracker meal in a flat pan.
7. Mix 1 cup milk, 2 eggs, 1/4 teaspoon salt, and 1/4 teaspoon black pepper in a separate pan.
8. Dip peppers in the egg mixture, then in cracker meal. Repeat the procedure.
9. Deep fry at 365 degrees (F) until golden brown.
10. Drain on paper towels.
11. Makes 30 hors d'oeuvres.
